title: New Balance Men's 410 V6 Trail Running Shoe
description:
Be off-road ready in the New Balance 410v6 men’s trail shoe. Featuring a durable AT Tread rubber outsole, this shoe is fit for any adventure. Made with a sleek upper, ACTEVA midsole technology and a cushioned NB Comfort Insert, the versatile men’s running shoe is designed to keep you comfortable and stylish before, during and after your hike.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities

They fit my feet perfectly and  there is no better feeling of new shoes when your old shoes broke down! Just enough support.

XT-600 carbon rubber - outsole provides traction and durability
Cushioning - the underfoot feel and amount of impact protection provided by the compressing materials between the foot and running surface
Support - the level of pronation control built into the shoe, pronation is the inward rolling of the ankle through the gait cycle
Offset - the difference in height between the heel thickness and forefoot thickness of the shoe

title: Reebok Women's Ztaur Running Shoe
description: Reebok is an American-inspired global brand with a deep fitness heritage and a clear mission: To be the best fitness brand in the world. Not an easy one. But if there is one brand that can make it happen, it is Reebok, the brand that was fundamentally part of a fitness movement that forever changed the way we look at spandex and headbands. Sure, this is not the 1980s anymore – the world has moved on. But so has Reebok and it continues to be daring. Daring is knowing greatness doesn’t come from sameness. The past years have been characterized by a transformation from traditional sports to fitness. The three sides of the Reebok Delta, a symbol of change and transformation, represent the physical, mental and social changes that occur when individuals embrace the challenge of bettering themselves in the gym, in their lives and in the world.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro.

title: Brooks Men's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
description: Smooth roads are ahead when you put on the Ghost 14. This award-winning runner favorite now features 100% DNA LOFT in the midsole, for a softer, smoother ride. We’ve also improved the fit so the shoe adjusts even more comfortably to your foot.
features: THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Brooks has lost a step on wear/quality, but still a very good shoe
reviews.text:
First, Brooks is a top running shoe manufacturer, and I always like buying their products, and they are to be applauded for releasing shoes in widths, which lets you get a shoe that fits, which is essential. If a shoe does not fit properly, then it will be extremely difficult to run (or walk any distance in). The Brooks Glycerin is one model up from the Ghost, that has better cushioning, but is no longer available in a Narrow width, and is more expensive, but the Ghost is a pretty good shoe on its own. I would have given the Ghost 5 stars, but the Ghost 14 is not quite perfect, having two areas where it could be better (and was better previously).

The first picture shows a Ghost 14 (on the left), next to a Ghost 13 (the previous model, on the right), and you can see the Ghost 14 has less tread, so wears out sooner, I would say roughly 50-75 miles of road (asphalt) running. The picture shows both shoes new. The Ghost 13 also was a little more cushioned, but you can offset that some by putting a different insole in the 14, and a lot of runners replace the insoles anyway. The thinner tread means less mileage on the 14s, but still probably as good as most of the competition, just no longer better here.

The second pictures shows the upper collar on a Ghost 14, and the fabric Brooks is using there (not so much on the 13 and earlier models) is nice and soft, but does not hold up. I generally see holes or failures at the top of the lace area, and on some shoes, towards the back collar area. You get a lot of fraying, sometimes holes, which is more an appearance problem than anything that would impact running in them, but means also you cannot wear them casually, at least where someone might see the failures. That may be an aspect that is supply chain related, they used to hold up better, but I have seen the problem on two pair of Ghost 14s, and other manufacturers do a bit better (probably needs a bit more nylon, to hold up longer).

I will say that the Ghost 14 has a narrower tongue at the top, that is shared with the 13 but was new there, and I have not seen it much in other shoes, but actually works very well, so I give kudos to Brooks on that design innovation. There is less chance that during a run the tongue will shift over into the forefoot, at least in a painful way, and you don't have to stop to shift it back.

So overall, particularly at this price point, the Brooks continues to be good value and one of the top shoes to consider, but as with anything, there are a couple of areas that could use further improvement.

title: EZ-STIK 13.1 Half Marathon Decal Sticker 6" 5k 10k Running Shoes runnerA010
description: There is no background color. The surface that you apply the sticker to will become your background color. This will be a single color sticker. This is a DIE-CUT vinyl decal meaning that the background has been trimmed off. If there is a background color in the picture, it is used only as a representation. The background color will be the surface color you place the sticker on (or clear if you put it on a window). The decal will come with clear transfer tape, so you can easily apply it to anything you like (walls, windows, cars, mailbox, mirrors, laptops, etc etc etc). I use PREMIUM Oracal brand vinyl for all decals. Application is relatively easy. Your decal will come as THREE pieces - the backing paper, the sticker itself, and the clear transfer tape. Make sure you are applying to a CLEAN surface. You carefully pull the clear transfer tape up from the backing paper, making sure that it pulls the sticker up with it (if it does not, then firmly press down on it with a squee-gee or credit card or something similar until it sticks properly to the clear transfer tape). Then you apply the sticker and clear transfer tape to whatever surface you would like the decal on. You then use a squee-gee or credit card or something similar to firmly press down once again, making sure that the sticker STICKS, and then you carefully and slowly remove the clear transfer tape from the top, leaving behind only the sticker. I have found that on some surfaces (especially walls and wood surfaces), it helps to leave the clear transfer tape on for awhile to make sure everything is sticking well before removing it. I do not issue refunds or exchanges on vinyl decals. Please understand this before you bid. Some decals are more difficult to apply than others (especially the little ones!) - likewise, some surfaces are more difficult to apply decals to.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 Running Shoes
description: Celebrate the retro style of the historic Japanese capital in this special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo running shoe from ASICS. This updated version combines advanced components with a striking new design that honors Tokyo's heritage. The GEL-KAYANO 26 shoe allows you to tackle long distances in comfort, thanks to the rearfoot GEL technology that's been redesigned for improved shock absorption upon impact. You'll also benefit from a bouncy feel that stems from the FLYTEFOAM Propel midsole technology. The DUOMAX technology in the midsole offers better support and helps resist excessive overpronation while I.G.S. technology promotes smoother propulsion. Additionally, this style is accented with reflective detailing to improve your visibility when running in low light settings. Get the inspiration and support you need to smash your training goals in the special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo performance running shoe from ASICS.

reviews.title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 doesn't work for me

I really wanted to love these shoes. I bought the Black ones and they looked great. But trying them on was another thing. Under where my toes connect to my feet there is a ridge or slight raised part that I could really feel. From the ridge to the toe of the shoe my toes seemed to slightly drop making the shoe very uncomfortable for me.
I am really glad that I purchased them through Amazon the free return policy worked for me. I sent the shoes back the next morning. The credit showed up the next morning.

reviews.title: Update:Tread showing considerable wear after 70 miles
reviews.text:
Two star: Upper is holding up nicely. Tread is already worn out after only 70 miles. I tried ASICS because reviews talk of superior durability. So far for me upper is good, sole is not.

Update: I reached out to ASICS about the tread life. After sending pictures of tread wear after 70 miles they sent code for replacement shoe from ASICS.com.
That’s pretty awesome customer service in my book.

So far 20 miles on new Kayano fit and finish is great.

Comfort on gel-Kayano 28 is far superior to previous models.

Extra wide is a touch narrow but all in all the first 20 miles is running great.

title: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal Jogging Running Shoes Run Choose Size & Color (V29) (6.25" X 3.75", Blue)
description: This vinyl decal is made of high quality indoor/outdoor rated and proven Oracal 651 vinyl!! -These are perfect for car windows, skateboards, Ipads, etc. (Practically any smooth, clean surface) -A vinyl cut sticker means that there is no background or clear backing. Only the image is the adhesive part! -These are not Cling-ons. -Please apply only to a clean, dry surface. Below are some instructions on how to apply these cool stickers: Step 1 Rub the sticker with a credit card or something with a rigid surface to be sure the transfer tape is properly adhered to the sticker. Step 2 Clean and dry the desired area. Stickers will stick best to clean smooth surfaces. Step 3 Remove the paper backing slowly making sure the sticker stays adhered to the transparent transfer tape Step 4 Carefully position the sticker to the desired area. Once the sticker sticks it will be nearly impossible to reposition without destroying the sticker. Rub the sticker from one side to the other, eliminating any air bubbles. Step 5 Use a hard edged object like a credit card to make sure the entire sticker is fully adhered to the surface. Step 6 Slowly remove the transfer tape. Making sure no part of the sticker remains on the transfer tape. Step 7 Check for air bubbles. In most cases air bubbles can be worked to the edge of the sticker, but if not, a pin hole will allow the air out and become virtually invisible, once the bubble is gone. That’s it! Your sticker is now worry free. It will last through rain, sleet, snow and gentle washing's. You can remove the sticker from glass surfaces with a razor blade or in most cases a fingernail will get the removal process started.
features: 26.2 Marathon Girl Womens Vinyl Sticker Decal

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 5 Running Shoes
description:
For the higher mileage runner looking for structured cushioning and support, the GT-2000 5 shoe features a FluidRide® midsole for exceptional bounce-back and cushioning. An added stitch-down toecap enhances durability and forefoot support.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Mesh/Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
I.G.S (Impact Guidance System) Technology: ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic DuoMax Support System: This evolution of DuoMax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidRide Midsole: FluidRide provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology: This Trusstic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.
features: 100% Synthetic/Fabric
Rubber sole
Heel measures approximately 1.75"
Anti-debris mesh protects the foot from dirt, twigs, and pebbles
Contra grip is designed for better traction and durability on mixed trails and complicated landscapes
Water resistance adds an extra layer of protection from the elements
Lightweight material maximizes comfort, fit, and breathability
Collar shape and sole hardness is specifically designed for a woman's foot

reviews.title: Perfect trail shoe!
reviews.text: Bought these for my wife. Her words are: "I love them"! She says she has wide feet and they still fit perfectly, she wore them all day for a 14 mile mud run/obstacle course and had a great experience with these shoes. Great traction in the mud!

reviews.text: I own more than one pair of these, as the fit and support work well for me. They cradle the foot, especially under the arch, and fit more narrowly than many other sneakers (which makes them just right for me). I get many compliments on the appearance, which is streamlined and not at all "clunky."

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Roav V1 Running Shoe
description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. The midsole features Fresh Foam cushioning which provides a feeling of plush comfort while remaining lightweight. NDurance technology makes the rubber outsole more durable so you can wear these shoes whether you're strutting on the sidewalk or jogging off-road. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride.
features: 100% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole

Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own.

Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride.

NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. Ndurance rubber outsole technology provides superior durability in high-wear areas to help get more out of the shoes.

Ultra Heel: These neutral running shoes boast a head-turning heel that performs as well as it looks. The Ultra Heel design hugs the back of the foot for a snug, supportive fit. This unique heel works alongside the bootie upper for all-day comfort.
8mm Drop: These lightweight shoes feature a heel-to-toe drop of approximately 8mm. Due to variances created during development and manufacturing processes, references to 8mm are approximate.

reviews.title: Beyond comfortable
reviews.text: I love everything about these shoes. I bought them as a walking shoe to wear during our cruise. I actually wore them during our stop in San Juan. We walked over 25,000 steps in San Juan on a self walking tour and these were beyond comfortable. My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

This pair of running shoes for kids is designed with no-sew overlays to help ensure a top-notch fit and a sleek feel that's perfect for all-day, any-day wear. The synthetic and mesh construction offers breathability and a proper fit, so your little one can tackle whatever their day throws at them, from recess shenanigans with friends to after-school practice. Best of all is the cool style of these cushioned running shoes for kids. Fun, playful colors and eye-catching patterns make for a pair of sneakers that fashion-conscious youngsters will love.

reviews.title: Size down 1/2 a size
reviews.text: I was a new runner 2 years ago and after much research bought a pair of 1080 v10's.  They immediately reduced the pain I felt when running.  Here I am 1 1/2 years later and in need of a new pair of shoes so I bought these 1080 v12's.  What can I say, they're even better than my v10's.  The only catch was I had to size down 1/2 a size from my normal shoe size.  Once I made that tweak the shoe fit amazingly and I'm off and running again.

reviews.title: Good show, but I can't really run in them...

reviews.title: walking on a cloud comfy
reviews.text:
I was looking for a comfortable all-purpose walking, going to work shoe. NB version 11 has more subdued colors. But they brought me v12 out since they didn't have my sizes left. I was hooked as I tried them on. They are the most comfy shoe I ever used, better than any Nike air, better than the walking co. store orthopedic shoes. These were just super soft. The size is what I usually wear if there is no wide version.

Seem breathable, I got the navy blue with orange trims. I think it looks fine, not into the flashy color. I switch to office shoes when I am in the office.

The only issue is the price is very high. This is my first ever new balance, I always thought they were just another running shoe brand, but man the fresh foam is the most cloud-like soles. I only had it for a few weeks, so not sure how long they will last. I usually wear Merrell an outdoor brand, they don't seem to last very long tho.

description: Dialed to grip and rip trails fast. For trail runners looking to get to their destination fast, The lightweight Switchback 2 is a race-ready machine that delivers more of what you need—long-distance cushioning placed into a nimble, grippy, and dialed-in package.

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right
reviews.text: I like the way the shoes fit; however, they are more attractive in the picture than on my feet, at least to me.  They are a little pricey too, but all in all, I would recommend them.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 4 Running Shoes
description:
The gt-2000 4 is the core runner’s bread and butter with its balance of cushioning and stability, outfitted by the comfortably supportive dynamic duomax and guidance trusstic system that also enhance gait efficiency. Our rear foot and forefoot gel cushioning systems are now even more adaptive, assisting mild to moderate over pronators alike with greater support, while the fluid ride midsole offers the ultimate ride.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Impact Guidance System (I.G.S): ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic duomax Support System: This evolution of duomax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid ride: fluid ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Truss tic System: This Truss tic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Great shoe for an over-pronator like me
reviews.text: I've used the GT-2000 shoes over the last few years and have yet to have issue with them. I over-pronate pretty badly and this shoe offers great support for that issue; My knees thank me. I found the shoe to fit exactly true to size and for those reviews that say it's small, people tend to forget that your feet swell when you run, especially longer distances! My personal size foot is between a 6.5-7 and I typically wear a 7 shoe for running, dress, or sandals. I can't say I know the difference between the GT-2000 model numbers (1-5?) except for new-ness. I have no issue with wearing older models and like the cheaper prices. For reference, I run half marathons several times a year on city sidewalks, asphalt, dirt roads, and dirt trails.

reviews.title: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, ...
reviews.text: This was a gift. Didn't fit. So, hearsay- I am not sure of the exact fit. They are exchanging for a bigger size though.

reviews.title: Great shoe but runs small
reviews.text: Great shoe, very supportive in the arch and heel. I love the bright colors of the Asics shoes. The only thing I would be leary of is the size of the shoe. It runs small. I wear an 8 and because of other reviews, bought a 8-1/2. They fit but are still a little snug. After wearing for a bit, they will loosen up enough to be great. If you have a wider foot, you may not like these particular shoes.

reviews.title: Color in photo is not quite accurate
reviews.text: Have always loved my Asics GT-2000.  32 marathons and our relationship continues!  My only comment about this particular color combo is the photo appears to be grey and more coral color.  When they arrived what looks like a coral color in the photo is closer to fluorescent orange!  They are a bit "loud".  If they had been full price I probably would not have chosen them because of this.  Too "loud" for my preferences.  However, given the clearance price I'll make do!  :)

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Arishi Trail V1 Trail Running Shoe
description: Hit the trails in comfort and style with the Fresh Foam Arishi Trail running shoes from New Balance. These comfortable running shoes are built tough with performance features designed to help keep your feet safe and supported. Toe Protect technology helps shield your feet from rocks, roots and debris as you tackle new terrain, and a durable AT Tread dual lug outsole provides versatile traction for both on- and off-road adventures. These trail shoes are crafted with textile and synthetic uppers that feature classic New Balance branding for a fresh, sporty look. No-sew upper construction adds to the sleek fit and feel that you'd expect from these lightweight running shoes. Underfoot, you’re treated to super soft comfort with Fresh Foam midsole technology that is precision-engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride. An EVA foam insert adds even more cushioned comfort to help fuel your runs. Wherever your trail takes you, arrive in comfort with these sleek, stylish and supportive running shoes.

reviews.title: WAY too tight over the foot.  NOT for Diabetics, IMHO!
reviews.text:
I've had these on for about an hour now, so I am sure they are not returnable. That's too bad, because an hour has shown me that they are very uncomfortable. I cannot imagine who would find them wearable. Maybe someone with abnormally narrow feet.

The VERY stretchy material they are made from makes them hard to get on. You MUST use a shoehorn, and even then, it is not easy. They also - unpleasantly - squeeze the foot. After an hour, my toes are getting cold from low circulation! Seriously! Plus, the material does not breathe well, despite it's "perforated" appearance. So my feet are hot and wet.

The laces are just decoration. It's the tight material that holds them on. Plus, the artsy-craftsy arch inset in the instep is an invitation to soiling underneath it, without giving much arch support.
Could these be knock-offs? I assumed the attractive price was because they are a discontinued color. Maybe they are just fakes!.

PS THESE ARE NOT FOR DIABETICS. There is too much restriction of circulation.

I was advised to get "caged" Ultraboosts...the ones that lace normally. (The "cage" is the plastic framework for the laces.) But I liked the color of these.

Big mistake.
